en.title: How TrueCircle Works
en.subtitle: Simple daily flow for emotional awareness and consistency

sections.title: Start With Emotional Check-In
sections.description: First-time users complete Emotional Check-In before entering the dashboard.

sections.title: Fill Daily Reflection Forms
sections.description: Use Mood Journal, trackers, and guided entries to log emotions and events.

sections.title: Run Screening Tests
sections.description: Use GAD-7 and PHQ-9 style questionnaires from the Screening Tests tile.

sections.title: Use CBT Hub Tools
sections.description: Access CBT practices like thought work, coping tools, and micro-lessons.

sections.title: Earn Rewards Coins
sections.description: Get coin rewards from daily activity and completed forms.

sections.title: Use Wallet Benefits
sections.description: Redeem coins for discount offers or activate temporary free upgrade, subject to eligibility.

sections.title: Switch Online and Offline Mode
sections.description: Core journaling works offline, while billing and subscription actions require online mode.

sections.title: Get Help When Needed
sections.description: Use WhatsApp support from Settings for assistance.

en.privacy_note: Personal entries are intended to stay local and privacy-first. See Privacy Policy for full details.
